/usr/bin/clang++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.5.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/run_unit_tests.dir/test_order_book.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_unit_tests.dir/test_risk_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_unit_tests.dir/__/src/order.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_unit_tests.dir/__/src/trading_engine.cpp.o -o run_unit_tests  ../lib/libgtest_main.a ../lib/libgtest.a
